prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.4 kg; Height 156.9 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.3%; 9 months ago 11.5%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 250mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 320mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.3kg; 9 months ago 54.7kg; 6 months ago 52.8kg; 3 months ago 55.2kg; current 53.4kg), Height (12 months ago 156.9cm; 9 months ago 156.9cm; 6 months ago 156.9cm; 3 months ago 156.9cm; current 156.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 111U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 107U/L; current 107U/L), AST (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 76U/L; current 82U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 84mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 82mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 83mL/min/1.73m²; current 82mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 12mg/g; 9 months ago 17mg/g; 6 months ago 12mg/g; 3 months ago 18mg/g; current 15mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 173mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 171mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.4g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 11.6g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.88 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
